How to measure

1. Chest

Measure under your arms around the fullest part of your chest.

2. Waist

Measure around your natural waistline, keeping the tape a bit loose.

3. Low hip

With your feet together measure around the fullest part of your hips/rear.

Product Details

Crafted from eco-friendly fabric, this shirt boasts a rustic texture that feels as unique as your child.

  • Unbuttoned Polo-style collar.
  • Dropped shoulders and short sleeves.
  • Contrasting fabric at the neck, cuffs, and hem.
  • Ambroidered at the chest.
  • All-over woven stripes.
Materials

Carefully selected premium materials ensure comfort, durability, and sustainability, delivering timeless style while remaining gentle on your skin and the environment.

Shipping & Returns

Fast worldwide shipping with tracking. Easy 30-day returns and exchanges. Shop confidently with hassle-free refunds on unworn items within thirty days policy guaranteed.

Outfit Inspiration

Ideas to refresh your everyday wardrobe

Complete The Look

Style & Comfort

Elastic waistband for a comfortable, adjustable fit.
Detalles del Producto

The elastic waistband ensures a snug fit, while the playful ruffles at the hems add a fun, girly touch that makes them stand out. Designed to pair perfectly with the matching toweling top, these shorts create a cute, coordinated look that’s perfect for any summer adventure.

  • Playful ruffled hems for a fun touch.
  • Crafted from 85% organic cotton and 15% recycled polyester.
  • Available in sizes from toddlers (2Y) to older girls (12Y).
  • Part of Cozmo's terry cloth clothing for kids collection.
Materiales

Designed for everyday wear, these pieces are easy to maintain and crafted to stay soft and vibrant wash after wash. Gentle on skin and simple to care for, they’re made to support an active, playful lifestyle.

  • Machine-washable for hassle-free cleaning.
  • Retains softness and shape after repeated washes.
  • Quick-drying fabric ideal for daily use.
  • Made to withstand active kids’ routines.
Materiales

Crafted from high-quality, kid-friendly fabrics that balance comfort, durability, and breathability. Each piece is thoughtfully made to feel gentle on the skin while offering long-lasting wear.

  • Soft, breathable blend for all-day comfort.
  • Durable fibers designed to resist wear.
  • Skin-friendly materials suitable for sensitive kids.
  • Responsibly sourced for better everyday basics.
1. Made from a soft

Made from a soft, eco-friendly blend of organic cotton and recycled polyester.

2. Softness and Practicality

Combines gentle textures with everyday durability for lasting comfort.

Offers effortless comfort with a laid-back silhouette that feels inviting.

Still Need Help?


Contact us Contact us

Frequently Asked Questions
How long does it take to process an order?

Los pedidos generalmente se procesan dentro de 1 a 2 días hábiles. Si entras a tu cuenta, en el apartado Mi Perfil, luego a "Mis Pedidos" podras revisar el estado de tu pedido en tiempo real.

Do you ship internationally?

Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. Shipping times and rates vary by location, and all available options will be shown at checkout.

What is your return policy?

We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition with tags attached for a full refund.

What are your sizing options?

We offer a full range of sizes from XS to XL. Refer to our detailed size chart for accurate measurements to find your perfect fit.

Free delivery

In most US countries from $100

Free returns

Up to 30 days to return your items.

Payment 100% secured

Multiple payment options offered.

Customer service

Monday-Friday: 9AM-4PM
